gigapan.name: Niko, at Noisebridge
gigapan.description: There are a few, er, issues with this portrait...like, for example, the ears. But there is lots of Win as well.  So enjoy the win, ignore the artifacts, or better, recontextualize the artifacts as signifiers of the dynamic nature of personality, they are reminders that Niko can't be captured as one simple presentation of self, that people are more complicated than that, and, er, something else with the ring of erudition.
